entries.name: I-Ching (Book of Changes) teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
entries.definition: I-Ching (Book of Changes) provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.

attributes.governor_essence: A I-Ching (Book of Changes) Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by i ching principles.
growth_paths: Through deepening I-Ching (Book of Changes) understanding
Via practical application of spiritual principles
ethical_principles: Act in alignment with divine will
Serve the highest good of all beings
Maintain authentic spiritual authority
Honor the wisdom of I-Ching (Book of Changes)
